prompt:
Abstract vertical stripes of varying widths in warm phosphor
amber tones against a deep warm-ink background, suggesting
perforated punch tape or edge-of-film sprocket holes, clean
geometric regularity with subtle variations in opacity and
width, gentle phosphor bloom on the brightest stripes, top-
heavy composition with near-empty negative space across the
bottom third, dark warm near-black background with amber cast,
vintage-computing aesthetic, no text no words no letters no
typography no labels no hardware no people no objects
title: SCSI Over WiFi: Talking to Vintage Hardware from Your Phone
subtitle: An open-source Raspberry Pi bridge that lets you send SCSI commands to vintage samplers and computers over HTTP and WebSocket -- no SCSI card required.
